feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Strategy
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Strategy Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BRIM Integration/ Strategical relevance of BTP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi folks,

Today I got into trouble with a customer who we have sold Integration Suite as THE strategic platform for his enterprise integration needs. The customer already uses DI for data integration and is super SAP heavy/centric. Now one of the first new projects is introducing SAP BRIM. And I had to learn that SAP proposed to our customer not to use integration suite but instead to use convergent mediation (https://www.sap.com/germany/products/financial-management/convergent-mediation.html) which I did not even know about before.

My customer is furious that we proposed integration suite and now they need another integration product in their first project. Also I saw some BRIM standard content on the business hub, but at the same time convergent mediation seems to be the tool of choice. Is there anybody out there who already implemented BRIM and had to decide between the two integration solutions? Is IS really not suited equally?

This case also makes me wonder why sap would not go for an integration suite first approach for such cases. With the ERP getting more and more modular I am afraid that we will get more such cases where micro solutions get their own integration solution bundled. That would make IS with its recent price raise a more difficult sell since the strategic importance could be questioned.

 Would be interesting to get the communities take on this and some kind of guidance would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,

Peter

 

SAP Integration Strategy SAP Integration Suite @UdoPaltzer @svenhuberti

entry.title: Error in Scrap Sales Order
entry.content:
While creating scrap sale order below error occurred. Please do the needful.
"Material 8000000011 is not defined for sales org. D001, distr.chan.40, language EN" 
"Sales from sales organization, D001 dist. chan.40, plant D101 are not defined"

entry.title: Quote comparison in sap
New tanks were created for plant 3001, when testing Dips in O4_TIGER it posts but in zmm_silo_stock
entry.content: New tanks were created for plant 3001, when testing Dips in O4_TIGER it posts but in zmm_silo_stock we get the below error.

entry.title: How to avoid quick books job failed after scheduling?
entry.content: the source is Quick books and target is MS SQL and job development is completed. job is moved production and it's scheduled every day and one week cycle execution is successfully run after first day of week it's getting failed. So could you please give suggestion on this.it will help full to everyone.

entry.title: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate with the Jira to create a ticket/issue via SAP CPI to reduce the usage of the third part tool which does the same thing. 

I have referred the below blogs and tried to create a sample IFlow in the sap cpi but unfortunately, I am unable to proceed further due to the error encountered which states as below. 

The Jira Cloud platform REST API (atlassian.com)

org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://<hostname>/rest/api/2/issue/ with statusCode: 415

FYI, I am able to get the details of the existing ticket but unable to create the ticket via CPI. But managed to create the ticket via POSTMAN.

Sample IFLow.

 

Payload used:

{
"fields": {
"project": {
"key": "SDC"
},
"summary": "Demo ticket from the CPI via API",
"issuetype": {
"name": "Task"
},
"description": "PLEASE IGNORE THIS ISSUE TICKET",
"assignee": {
"name": "Imran"
},
"labels": [
"Demo"
]
}
}

Please advice on this. Thanks in Advance

entry.title: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - please help
entry.content:
I have created a BPA  with 3 inputs

I am in the Editable version and tested the Automation, it was completed successfully, and after that released and  Deployed the Process, now what I wanted is, I want to pass the JSON payload using POSTMAN but that is creating error 

 

Error message: The activity 'automation_getCreatedJobStatus_1' cannot be started since the input is not correct: [[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/0/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/1/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/2/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/3/Job Count] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.]
Log ID:6888f174-b33b-4a02-b706-be6956b-us10

(screenshot attached below)

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build SAP Business Workflow SAP Business Process Automation by Redwood@Ron_Hagan

entry.title: Is it possible to export data as excel but with subtotals, such as in the pivot table format?
entry.content: Trying to export data from SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud into Excel. The issue is that everytime we need to add the subtotals and other parameters. Is it possible to export as a pivot table to make analysis much easier and more friendly?

entry.title: Change RFQ Form/XML
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to know if is possible to change the RFQ Form/XML of SAP Business One. For example, I am from Brazil and the item code in the form is named "ID do artigo" and i would like to change to "Código do Item". How can i get this?

I have searched on a lot of posts and I can't open SAP For Me notes, it stays loading forever.

entry.title: Excel Processing
entry.content: Hello, I imported the excel into my sap build apps project and now I got the id and everything. I need to get some data from the excel without using the Desktop Agent 3 or any other Desktop Agent. Please help me.

entry.title: SAP ABAP Proxy Doubt - CPI
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have a number of proxies developed using SAP PI ESR in our ERP system. We are calling same proxies using the XI adapter of CPI as there has been no requirements of modifying the proxies. We now want to discontinue the PI/PO and there will be no ESR. How do we mange the proxies that are existing in ERP without PI/PO. Please suggest the approach.

entry.title: Using the bearer token as authentication method for SFDC rest api in SAP PI/PO ID.
entry.content:
Hi, I am new to SAP PI/PO and am learning things. Can anyone help me show how to set up the communication channel in ID for SFDC to authenticate using the bearer token only, also I don't have the client ID and other creds of salesforce so for testing purposes I am using the bearer token but don't know how to do the same. In Postman I am getting the data using the bearer token but I don't know how to do the same in SAP ID.

Please provide the steps to set up and test the configurations with screenshots if possible.

entry.title: Upgrade Crystal report
entry.content:
Is there any solution to upgrade crystal report files with tools that work with  CI CD pipeline automation? Our preference is the way it could be embedded in Visual Studio. Can SAP help us provide a solution?

Regards,

Sadie

entry.title: SAP integration with Bitrix24
entry.content:
Hi,

We have 3 modules of SAP - MM, FICO and S&D from which data fields have to be extracted and processed in Bitrix24 (Leads and Deals modules/pipelines).

For example :

Invoices (receivables, tool billing, and others) and material dispatch will be fetched from SAP and processed in Bitrix24 Leads and Deals pipelines/modules in real time.

So please let me know whether possible.

entry.title: IPS conditional mapping of personal vs. business email from SF User to IAS User email-new
entry.content:
I have a requirement to set the email ID in IAS as below :

If Business Email ID is Empty and Personal Email ID (custom-string1) is empty - Set Email in IAS as Dummy

If Business Email ID is empty and Personal email ID ( custom-string1) is not empty - Set Email in IAS as  Personal Email ID [ Value in Custom-string1 field]

 Else if Business Email ID is not empty - Set email in IAS as Business Email ID

 

For this I have below code related to EMail ID in IAS source system :

 

{
"sourcePath": "$.emails",
"targetPath": "$.emails",
"optional": true,
"preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true
},
{
"sourcePath": "$.userName",
"targetPath": "$.emails[0].value",
"condition": "($.emails EMPTY true) && ($.custom02 EMPTY true)",
"preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true,
"functions": [
{
"function": "concatString",
"suffix": "@sap-test.de"
}
]
},
{
"sourcePath": "$.emails[?(@.primary== true)].value",
"optional": true,
"correlationAttribute": true
},

{
"sourcePath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:successfactors:2.0:User']['customFields'][?(@.customFieldName == 'custom02')]['value']",
"targetPath": "$.emails[0].value",
"condition": "($.emails EMPTY true) && ($.custom02 EMPTY false)"
},

The "&&" condition is unfortunately not working as when I have $emails as EMPTY and $.custom02 has a value it is still sending the DUMMY address to IAS , whereas it should send Custom02 to IAS in that case.

Is something wrong in syntax here . I am using SCIM2version.

Any help would be much appreciated. Thanks.

 

REgards,

Anuroop

entry.title: SAP CI - HTTP/OData Receiver Adapter Authentication On-Premise SAP
entry.content:
Dear All,

I know that there are multiple options like Basic, Principal Propagation, OAuth to authenticate on-premise SAP APIs using HTTP/OData receiver adapters. I was always using Basic but the now the design guidelines is asking us to use more secure method. Can anyone advise if I can go for OAuth for on-premsie SAP S/4 APIs? How to achieve this? Is there any documentation link?

entry.title: Problema: "Atualização dos números de cheque de momento bloqueados pelo usuário RFC_BEXS”.
entry.content:
Boa tarde,

Estamos com um problema onde nos apresentamos o seguinte erro:  “Atualização dos números de seleção de momento bloqueados pelo usuário RFC_BEXS”.
Percebemos  o aumento do tempo de espera que estava em 5 segundos para 12 segundos e o problema não foi resolvido.

Para casos automáticos (com erro de concorrência ou geração de F110 sem documento contábil gerado), o usuário consegue encontrar registros com usuário RFC_BEXS

Tela com o erro em anexo.

Alguém já passou por uma situação semelhante? como devemos proceder nesse caso?

Obrigada

entry.title: Why isn't the actual value changing after the O2C process?
Can any one help me to with these document to be retrieved
entry.content:
<Payload xmlns="urn:com.sap.b1i.vplatform:entity" Role="T" Type="Queue" add="Z.ES.003PostInventoryv1"/>
<Payload xmlns="urn:com.sap.b1i.vplatform:entity" Role="S">
<B1im_multimsg xmlns="">
<Init>
<Server>192.168.3.208</Server>
<Query>GoodsReceipt</Query>
<ObjectType>59</ObjectType>
</Init>
<B1out type="object">
<EskerTrans>
<row>
<iCtr>10</iCtr>
<WarehouseID>WLP</WarehouseID>
<ItemNumber>IN-000000160 </ItemNumber>
<UoM>CL</UoM>
<Qty>2</Qty>
<AmtDelivered>240.0</AmtDelivered>
<AccountCode>_SYS00000004107</AccountCode>
<Docdate>20/08/2024</Docdate>
<ReceiptNumber>5000000153</ReceiptNumber>
<UnitPrice>120.0</UnitPrice>
</row>
</EskerTrans>
</B1out>
</B1im_multimsg>
</Payload>
<vpf:Payload Role="X" id="atom7" ts="2024/08/26 10:47:45">
<b1im_multimsg>
<AdmInfo>
<Object>59</Object>
<Version>2</Version>
</AdmInfo>
<ObjectCode>59</ObjectCode>
<Documents>
<row>
<Comments>Esker Goods Receipt</Comments>
<Reference2>INV-GR</Reference2>
<JournalMemo>Goods Receipt</JournalMemo>
<DocType>I</DocType>
</row>
</Documents>
<Document_Lines/>
</b1im_multimsg>
</vpf:Payload>

entry.title: Storing payload data in Application Message Type: SAP_MessageType
entry.content:
Dear All,

In the Content Modifier, we have the option to store a payload field's value in the SAP_MessageType property, which can be viewed in CPI monitoring as shown below. However, will this impact monitoring storage capacity? Would it be better to avoid using this property and instead use a custom property with SAP_MessageProcessingLogCustomStatus for logging?

Please advise on the best practice.
